title: vector mod
description: This Mod adds Vector, from Despicable me 1.
body: This Mod has the purpose of adding a new strong entity, which can be hard to beat but also gives a decent Reward. There are still bugs and i dont plan to update this mod. This Mod adds Vector, from Despicable me 1. He spawns with vectarmor ( a very strong armor ). When killing Vector, he drops the vectorrite which can be crafted to the full set of vectarmor. He spawns rarely in Caves and the Fortnite Biome. Due to a Bug you can ride him.
